men_height.description: Heights (in cm) of adult men in the population, summarized by mean and standard deviation under a Normal distribution assumption. This variable and women_height describe the same population of adults split by sex.

women_height.description: Heights (in cm) of adult women in the population, summarized by mean and standard deviation under a Normal distribution assumption. This variable and men_height describe the same population of adults split by sex.

height_threshold.description: Height cutoff value (182.9 cm, i.e., six feet) used to compute the z-scores and tail probabilities for both men and women.

proportion_female.description: Proportion of adults in the population who are female (60%), used as the prior probability in the Bayes' theorem calculation.
